data.description: German Minister Merz States That Germany Will Not Approve Military Equipment Exports To Israel For Gaza Use Until Further Notice

data.title: Inception Growth Acquisition Limited shifts special meeting to Aug 19, 2025, extends redemption deadline.
data.description: New York, on August 8, 2025, Inception Growth Acquisition Limited, a blank check company, revealed that it held a special meeting which was promptly adjourned without transacting any business. The meeting has been rescheduled for August 19, 2025. This adjournment applies to all proposals outlined in the Company’s definitive proxy statement submitted to the SEC on May 27, 2025, with additional information provided in supplements on June 26, 2025, and July 31, 2025. Notably, one of the proposals in discussion was the approval of a potential business merger with AgileAlgo Holdings Ltd.

data.title: Gravity Co., Ltd. releases Q2 2025 financial results; no specific numbers provided.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, in Seoul, South Korea, GRAVITY Co., Ltd. (NasdaqGM: GRVY), a leading online and mobile game developer and publisher in South Korea, released their unaudited financial report for the second quarter ending on June 30, 2025. The financial results were prepared following the International Financial Reporting Standards by the International Accounting Standards Board. The report also included various business updates.

data.title: H World Group Limited to release Q2 2025 financial results on Aug 20, 2025. Key player in hotel industry.
data.description: Singapore and Shanghai, August 8, 2025 - H World Group Limited, a major player in the global hotel industry, revealed plans to unveil its unaudited financial results for the second quarter and interim of 2025 on August 20, 2025. The financial report will be released after the trading hours of The Stock Exchange of Hong Kong Limited and before the U.S. market opens. H World Group Limited, traded as NASDAQ: HTHT and HKEX: 1179, aims to provide investors with insights into its performance during the specified period.

data.title: Binance partners with BBVA in Spain for secure crypto custody following FTX incident, enhancing trust in exchanges.
data.description: With trust in cryptocurrency exchanges still lacking, Binance's recent partnership with BBVA for custody services signifies a move towards more conventional financial security measures. This deal is a significant step in bolstering confidence in the industry, where approximately 58% of consumers remain wary of utilizing exchanges due to concerns related to security and transparency. By teaming up with BBVA, a major player in the traditional banking sector, Binance aims to enhance the safety of its users' assets and promote a more secure environment for trading digital assets. This collaboration underlines a growing trend in the crypto space as exchanges seek to integrate established financial institutions to improve credibility and provide clients with added peace of mind.

data.title: Gray Media to pay $0.08/share in quarterly cash dividend to shareholders on Sep 30, 2025; record date: Sep 15, 2025.
data.description: Today, Gray Media, Inc. (NYSE: GTN) based in Atlanta, declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.08 per share for its common stock and Class A common stock. This dividend will be distributed on September 30, 2025, to shareholders recorded as of September 15, 2025.

data.title: Tempus AI, Inc. (NASDAQ: TEM) reported 2nd quarter 2025 revenue of $314.6 million, an 89.6% increase YoY. Genomics revenue rose 115.3% YoY to $241.8 million.
data.description: In Chicago, Tempus AI, Inc. (NASDAQ: TEM), a tech firm driving AI's use in improving precision medicine and patient care, shared its financials for the quarter finishing on June 30, 2025. They saw a notable 89.6% year-over-year revenue jump, reaching $314.6 million for the second quarter. Genomics revenue specifically surged by 115.3% year-over-year to $241.8 million, propelled by robust year-over-year volume growth in Oncology (26%) and Hereditary (32%) testing. Additionally, Data and services revenue experienced a 35% increase.

data.title: Docebo Inc. reports Q2 2025 results, exceeding revenue and profitability targets, in still-uncertain market conditions.
data.description: In Toronto, Docebo Inc. (NASDAQ: DCBO; TSX:DCBO) disclosed its financial figures for the three and six months concluded on June 30, 2025. The leading learning platform provider, grounded in artificial intelligence (AI) and innovation, surpassed expectations with strong results in revenue and profitability for the quarter. The company maintained disciplined execution in the face of ongoing macroeconomic uncertainties. All figures are reported in US dollars unless specified otherwise.

data.title: Earn crypto without trading: Diversify with crypto index funds & ETFs for passive income. Minimize trading, maximize gains.
data.description: Investing in crypto index funds and exchange-traded funds (ETFs) can be a way to generate passive income while diversifying your portfolio and reducing the need for frequent trading. These funds typically track the performance of a specific cryptocurrency index or a selection of cryptocurrencies. By investing in a diversified basket of digital assets, investors can reduce risk and exposure to high volatility. This passive investment approach can be particularly appealing to those looking to earn returns without actively managing their holdings. It offers a way to participate in the crypto market's potential growth while minimizing the time and effort needed for day-to-day trading.
